stages.objective: Observe baseline RR response behavior for mixed-length jobs.
stages.goal: Identify response-relevant trace events before tuning.
stages.theory_detail: Response time reflects how quickly a process first receives CPU after arrival.

hints.concept: Response metrics depend on early dispatch decisions.
hints.explicit: Run baseline and inspect first dispatch tick for each process.

stages.objective: Diagnose whether baseline run meets response requirement.
stages.goal: Use metrics and trace to explain pass/fail state.

hints.concept: Good response can still fail if completion is insufficient.
hints.explicit: Run until completion target is reached and re-check response threshold.

stages.objective: Tune policy/quantum to satisfy response target under limits.
stages.goal: Meet response and completion checks within policy-change budget.

hints.concept: Quantum tuning shifts latency tradeoff; validate both metrics.
hints.explicit: Apply policy change, rerun workload, and submit only when both checks pass.
